Term Loan Facility

4. Terms & Conditions

## 4.1 Drawdown The Borrower shall draw down the full loan amount on the **Disbursement Date** as specified in Section 2. Partial drawdown is not permitted under this facility unless separately agreed in writing by the Bank. ## 4.2 Repayment Repayments shall be made on the dates set out in the Repayment Schedule in Section 3. All payments are to be made in **{{loan.currency}}** by GIRO deduction from account number **{{loan.debitAccountNumber}}** maintained with the Bank. The Borrower shall ensure sufficient funds are available in the designated account on each due date. ## 4.3 Prepayment The Borrower may prepay the outstanding principal in full or in part, subject to giving **30 calendar days' prior written notice** to the Bank. A prepayment fee of **{{loan.prepaymentFeeRate}}% of the prepaid amount** shall apply if prepayment is made within the first **{{loan.prepaymentLockInMonths}} months** of the loan tenure. ## 4.4 Default and Events of Default The following shall constitute Events of Default: 1. Failure to make any payment when due and such failure continues for **7 business days** after the due date 2. Material breach of any representation, warranty, or covenant under this Agreement 3. Insolvency, winding-up proceedings, or appointment of a receiver over the Borrower's assets 4. Any cross-default on other material financial indebtedness of the Borrower Upon an Event of Default, the Bank reserves the right to declare the entire outstanding balance immediately due and payable, and to exercise all rights available under applicable law. ## 4.5 Security This facility is granted on the basis of the following security: - **{{security.type}}**: {{security.description}} - The Borrower undertakes not to encumber, transfer, or dispose of the secured assets without prior written consent from the Bank. ## 4.6 Covenants Throughout the tenure of this facility, the Borrower shall: - Maintain a **debt service coverage ratio (DSCR) of not less than {{covenants.minDSCR}}x** measured semi-annually - Provide audited financial statements within **90 days** of each financial year end - Promptly notify the Bank of any material adverse change in its financial condition or business operations ## 4.7 Governing Law This Agreement is governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of **{{governingLaw}}**. Any dispute arising out of or in connection with this Agreement shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of **{{jurisdiction}}**.

5. Execution

By signing below, the parties confirm they have read, understood, and agree to be bound by the terms of this Business Loan Agreement.
